form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign seventh of 10 at Cowra Cl3 January 18 over 1375m, 6 len behind Ceremonious with 55kg at $4.20. Previously first up; seventh of 11 at Canberra 4yo+ Bm50 September 5 over 1000m, soft track; 1.5 len behind Aegipan with 60kg at $11. This is an ideal race to kick off. Makes plenty of appeal in the new surrounds.
